zh.lifeSummary: Hawise de London是Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London和Eva的女兒，於1211年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯托克 布盧納。她於1238年之前與Sir Henry de Turberville結婚。她去世於1274年6月在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年63歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根艾尤尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: London
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone who came from London or a nickname for someone who had made a trip to London or had some other connection with the city. In some cases however, the Jewish name was purely artificial. The placename, recorded by the Roman historian Tacitus in the Latinized form Londinium, is obscure in origin and meaning, but may be derived from pre-Celtic (Old European) roots with a meaning something like ‘place at the navigable or unfordable river’.

variants.name: Lonon
meanings: English: probably a variant of   London  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Hawise de London was born in 1211, in Stoke Bruerne, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London and Eva. She married Sir Henry de Turberville before 1238. She died in June 1274, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Ewenny, Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Hawise de London est née en 1211, à Stoke Bruerne, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London et Eva. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Turberville avant 1238. Elle est décédée en juin 1274, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Ewenny, Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Hawise de London wurde 1211 in Stoke Bruerne, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London und Eva geboren. Sie hat vor 1238 Sir Henry de Turberville geheiratet. Sie starb im Juni 1274 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Ewenny, Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Londonは1211年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアストク ブルエルンでThomas Lord of Kidwelly de LondonとEvaの娘として生まれた。1238年以前にSir Henry de Turbervilleと結婚した。彼女は1274年6月にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで63歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンエウエニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de London(은)는 1211년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스토크 브루어니에서 Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London(와)과 Eva의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1238년 이전 Sir Henry de Turberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1274년 6월 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건 웬이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hawise de London nasceu em 1211, em Stoke Bruerne, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London e Eva. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry de Turberville antes 1238. ru.lifeSummary: Hawise de London родилась в 1211 г. в местности сток бруирн, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Thomas Lord of Kidwelly de London и Eva. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Turberville перед 1238 г. Она умерла июнь 1274 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности ювенни, глэморган, Уэльс.

Se casó con Sir Henry de Turberville antes de 1238. Murió en junio de 1274, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Ewenny, Glamorgan, Gales.
